economic_notes: Saaiyouck Development Corporation investigates and pursues various business opportunities within the Nation's traditional territories. A-Tlegay Fisheries Limited Partnership acquires and manages various fishing licences and quota. Related party 0986442 BC Ltd. trades in cryptocurrency. Nation owns and rents a townhouse and condominium to related family members of Chief and Council.
notes: Fiscal year is 2021 (year ended March 31, 2021), not 2024. Auditor is Chan Nowosad Boates Inc. based in Campbell River, BC. Two government business enterprises/partnerships accounted for by modified equity method: A-Tlegay Fisheries Limited Partnership (12.99% interest) and Saaiyouck Development Corporation (100% owned). Portfolio investment in BC FN Gaming Limited Partnership at cost ($110). Deferred revenue includes $150,000 remaining from $250,000 land access payment from London Enterprises Ltd. received March 2017, recognized over 10 years to 2027. Related party loan of $30,000 to 0986442 BC Ltd. (crypto trading company) with deferred repayment demand. COVID-19 noted as subsequent event with potential material impact on FY2022. Segment disclosure table appears in reversed/mirrored text in original document. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($291,164) + Kwakiutl District Council ($5,802) + Province of BC ($36,000) = $332,966. OSR calculated as total revenue ($1,124,713) minus total government transfers ($332,966) = $791,747.
